attempts.code_tried:
have houter : IsPullback (s ≫ p₁) X.hom X.hom (y₀.left ≫ Y.hom) := by
  have hiso : IsPullback (𝟙 X.left) X.hom X.hom (𝟙 (Spec (.of kbar))) := IsPullback.of_horiz_isIso ⟨by simp⟩
  rwa [← hsp1, ← hsec] at hiso
have hL : IsPullback s X.hom p₂ y₀.left := IsPullback.of_right houter hsp2 (IsPullback.of_hasPullback X.hom Y.hom)
have hrange : Set.range s.base = p₂.base ⁻¹' Set.range y₀.left.base := by simpa [...] using AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.image_preimage_eq_of_isPullback hL.flip Set.univ

Robustness lessons: (a) htoUnit / hsec close by `by simp` (the `rwa [Over.tensorUnit_hom, Category.comp_id]` form fails — Category.comp_id did not match `_ ≫ 𝟙 (Spec _)`); (b) hsp2 needs `exact congrArg (· ≫ y₀.left) htoUnit` because plain rw left a reflexive `a=a` unsolved (middle object (𝟙_).left vs Spec _ defeq-not-syntactic); (c) rewrite the IsPullback HYPOTHESIS backwards (`rwa [← ...] at hiso`), not the goal forward (fragile under dependent IsPullback).
